final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: XINT is a priority list. 'Interest Expense' is the preferred general label. The candidate list appears to miss the more substantive reported line 'Interest cost' visible in the full A-column preview, so I added it as fallback ahead of the lease-specific interest line. Manual review is flagged because 'Interest cost' was chosen from outside the candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest cost

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity measure.

variables.notes: No separate parent-equity and non-controlling-interest lines are shown, so 'Total shareholders equity' is the best available BE measure.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line appears on the provided Balance Sheet. Because BE uses total equity in this case, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
